examples: Also known as the "chapeau", is the recipient of the call.
See, if you give a woman whiskers and a chapeau (hat), the woman becomes a cat.
In awe of the highest mountain peak in the Alps, Mont Blanc. Today the mighty lady wore a snug nebulous chapeau.
Here, some helpful words of wisdom for any occasion that might call for a fantastic chapeau.
Unlikely as it seemed at the time, this strategy has now been vindicated: chapeau!
